summary.summary: Bumps the APP_DEV_VERSION build variable in Config.xcconfig from 0.8.3.2 to 0.8.3.3. The change is recorded in the commit titled "CI: Bump APP_DEV_VERSION to 0.8.3.3 [skip ci]" and shown in the diff for Config.xcconfig (diff:4fea9e53fd18, file:c0fa4a48f07f, commit:dbc10266177e).
summary.userFacingImpact: No direct user-facing behavior changes are evident in the patch; it only updates an internal development version variable in a configuration file (Config.xcconfig) (file:c0fa4a48f07f, diff:4fea9e53fd18).
